author: y4rr
content: [result] Added ptx_f32_to_f64() runtime transform function + get_f64_ptx() caching helper. 43 simple f64 launchers now derive their PTX from the f32 source via mechanical substitution (register types, load/store widths, byte offsets, float literals). Each launcher uses a static OnceLock<String> for zero-cost after first call. The 21 complex kernels (transcendentals with polynomial implementations) retain hand-written f64 PTX. New kernels can use get_f64_ptx() instead of hand-writing f64 variants. 3271 tests pass.
